issuer_name_as_stated: Jaro Institute of Technology Management and Research Limited
extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by versus against each entity: all criminal cells in the Against rows are Nil, statutory/regulatory cells in the Against rows are Nil, and the Company has 2 tax proceedings against it; the Promoters have 4 tax proceedings, but promoter-personal tax matters are excluded from the company/group tax count and aggregate. The quantified amount against the Company is ₹97.25 million, comprising the Company’s 2 tax proceedings and 1 material civil proceeding; no subsidiary row is disclosed, and all By rows are excluded. The contingent-liabilities disclosure is as at March 31, 2025 and has no stated Total row, so the quantified components were summed: GST ₹9.04 million + Service Tax ₹16.46 million + the Bennet, Coleman civil claim ₹71.75 million = ₹97.25 million, converted from million to crore by dividing by 10. Company-wide customer concentration for the most recent full fiscal year, Fiscal 2025, is 62.40% for the top 5 and 81.38% for the top 10, measured as a percentage of revenue from operations. The source monetary tables use ₹ million; ₹1 million equals ₹0.1 crore.
